message:
beads: advance frankenredis-ra8a (SUBSCRIBE family NOSCRIPT) to in_progress

Flip frankenredis-ra8a from open to in_progress — with the LATENCY
NOSCRIPT series landed, an agent has picked up the parallel parity
work for the pub/sub subscription commands (SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE,
PSUBSCRIBE, PUNSUBSCRIBE, SSUBSCRIBE, SUNSUBSCRIBE), all of which
upstream Redis marks NOSCRIPT in their command metadata but which
currently lack a script_nesting_level guard in the fr-command
handlers. No code changes in this commit — just the status flip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
